source.name: CDTFA Open Data Portal — Insurance Tax Assessed by Insurer Type
source.publisher: California Department of Tax and Fee Administration

caveats: Assessed amounts by insurer type — the tax on gross premiums written in California (2.35% standard rate). Tax paid by a named insurer is not public; the Department of Insurance publishes premium volumes by company, but not tax.
The budget waterfall shows the DOF General Fund estimate; CDTFA assessments differ slightly in timing and scope (e.g. surplus lines are administered separately).

budget_reference.note: The budget waterfall shows the Department of Finance's enacted estimate for 2025-26. CDTFA assessed $3.47B on premiums written in 2024 — close measures, different timing and scope, shown side by side.
